rulings.Case Title: WALLACE CAWELTI et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDENTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Thursday, July 8, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. Russell Stanaland and Lerner Veit & Stanaland LLP¿s motion to withdraw as attorney of record for Defendant Canoga Chrysler-Plymouth is granted. No opposition filed. A hearing is required unless a representative of the defendant informs defense counsel that the defendant does not contest the tentative ruling. =(220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: CALVIN OXFORD et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION For Reconsideration Of Order Determining Issues To Be Retried, Based Upon New And Different Facts [Ccp § 1008 (B)]
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Thursday, July 8, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 3. Plaintiff¿s motion for reconsideration of order determining issues to be retried is denied. The record of the first trial does not indicate that Judge Mason made a pre-verdict ruling that defendant lacked sufficient evidence to support a government contractor defense to failure to warn as a matter of law under the correct standard articulated by the court of appeal in Oxford v. Foster Wheeler LLC (2009) 177 Cal.App.4th 700. =(220/HEK)
